checkout.agreeToRefundPolicy: By completing payment, you agree to our <1>Refund Policy</1> and all sales are final.

refundPolicy.title: LUCENTIS REFUND & RETURN POLICY
refundPolicy.subtitle: (Refund & Return Policy)
refundPolicy.intro: When making a payment on this website, the customer confirms that they have read, understood and agreed to the entire Refund & Return Policy below.

section1.title: 1. GENERAL PRINCIPLES
section1.p1: All products/services sold on the website are provided on an "All Sales Are Final" principle.
section1.p2: After a successful payment, the transaction is considered complete and cannot be canceled.
section1.p3: We do not accept requests for refunds, order cancellations, or returns for any reason, including but not limited to:
section1.l1: Customer changes their mind about purchasing
section1.l4: Customer did not carefully read the product description
section1.l5: Customer did not understand the terms before paying

section2.title: 2. NO REFUNDS APPLY
section2.p1: We do not process refunds in the following cases:
section2.l1: Customer has completed payment on the website
section2.l2: Order has been processed or is being processed
section2.l3: Customer is not satisfied with the product after purchase
section2.l4: Customer requests a refund through their bank or payment gateway
section2.l5: Customer claims they did not receive the goods but delivery information has been recorded by the system

section3.title: 3. CUSTOMER RESPONSIBILITY
section3.l1: Fully checking order details before paying
section3.l2: Carefully reading product descriptions, terms of service and refund policies
section3.l3: Providing accurate payment and delivery information
section3.warning: We are not responsible for errors arising from the customer's side.

section4.title: 4. PAYMENT DISPUTES (CHARGEBACK)
section4.p1: In case the customer arbitrarily initiates a payment dispute (chargeback) through their bank or payment gateway:
section4.l1: We reserve the right to provide all transaction evidence
section4.l2: Including: payment history, IP address, confirmation email, terms of use
section4.warning: Completed transactions will be considered valid and with the customer's consent.

section5.title: 5. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
section5.p1: The website and operating unit are not responsible for direct or indirect damages arising from the use of products or services purchased on the website.

describe.title1:
We build a
timeless technology platform
describe.desc1: The Lucentis team combines technology and security to create new products - where every second and every action counts. Each member is an artisan, constantly perfecting the product from the smallest detail.
describe.title2:
Secrets are buried
in every swing of the sword, where honor and loyalty are tested.
describe.desc2: The journey will lead the character through fierce battles, discover ancient secrets and face brutal enemies. Players must train combat skills, collect legendary weapons, and make decisions that affect their own destiny.
describe.sub2: Experience Shadow of the Ronin - a vivid RPG
describe.title3:
The technology war
where power and secrets have been hidden
describe.desc3: An underground city obscured by obsolete technologies and controlled artificial intelligence. You play as a mysterious hacker who accidentally discovers a lost source code that could change the fate of the world.
describe.sub3: Experience Cyber Eclipse - a vivid RPG

service1.title: Quality Products
service1.desc: We provide high-quality software products across various genres and platforms.

service2.title: Secure Transactions
service2.desc: Our platform ensures safe and secure transactions for all your software purchases.

service3.title: Customer Support
service3.desc: We are committed to providing excellent customer support and care.

aboutUs.mission1: At Lucentis, our mission is to connect users with the best products and experiences. We strive to create a platform where technology enthusiasts can discover, purchase, and enjoy quality software easily and confidently.
aboutUs.mission2: We are committed to providing professional, fast, and secure services — ensuring every transaction is transparent and reliable. By partnering with reputable publishers, Lucentis offers a diverse product inventory, always updating the latest trends in the digital technology world.
aboutUs.mission3: More than just a trading platform, we aim to build a cohesive community where every developer is heard, supported, and accompanied. That is why our team constantly develops the system, improves services, and puts user benefits at the center of all activities.
aboutUs.mission4: Thank you for choosing Lucentis for your needs. We look forward to serving you!

terms.title: Buying Guide
terms.intro: To purchase products on the lucentis.it.com website, please follow these instructions below:
terms.step1: Select the Game category you want.
terms.step2: The system redirects to the list page of the games you selected. Next, Click on the product to see product details.
terms.step3: Product information will appear. Next, Add the product to your cart.
terms.step3Success: There will be a notification that the product was successfully added to the cart.
terms.step4: You need to go to the cart page via the Icon Cart.
terms.step4Proceed: Then select Proceed to checkout to select widespread payment method.
terms.step4Redirect: The system will redirect you to the checkout page.
terms.step5: You can view product information and select widespread payment methods here.
terms.step5Card: If you choose to pay by payment card, choose The Debit or Credit.
terms.step5Paypal: If you choose to pay via Paypal, choose Paypal.
terms.step5CardProcess: After completing card information, click pay to complete the purchase transaction.
terms.step6: You will receive a successful purchase notification.
terms.step7: You can now check your email to get the product link.

handlingInstall.intro: To install the software, you need to purchase the software on the lucentis.it.com website, please follow the instructions below:
handlingInstall.step1: Click on your avatar, select Orders. The website will lead you to your order management page.
handlingInstall.step2: On the order management page, select one of your paid orders. Click the Download button. The website will automatically download the Source Code File

unity.title: UNITY SOURCE CODE INSTALLATION PROCESS
unity.req: * Requirement: Install Unity + Unity Hub. Install the correct Unity version requested by the project (usually stated in README or ProjectSettings/ProjectVersion.txt).
unity.s1: Step 1: Open the project in Unity Hub.
unity.s1Desc: First time opening may take a few minutes to import assets and compile scripts.
unity.s2L2: If there is an error, you need to:
unity.s2L2A: Install more packages (Unity will automatically suggest)
unity.s2L2B: Edit the file (if Unity version is not fully compatible)
unity.s3L2: Select Scenes In Build and ensure the main scene is ticked
unity.s3L4: Press the Play button ▶️ on the top bar
unity.s4L1: Firebase, Facebook SDK, In-App Purchase, Ads
unity.s4L2: Unity will show missing library errors if any
unity.s4Desc2: You need to carefully read the included README.md or Documentation.pdf file to know what to install.
unity.s5AL1: Go to File > Build Settings > Android
unity.s5AL2: Install Android SDK (via Unity Hub or Android Studio)
unity.s5IL1: Can only be run on macOS + Xcode
unity.s5IL2: Select iOS in Build Settings → Build → open with Xcode

reactNode.title: React + Node.js PROJECT INSTALLATION PROCESS
reactNode.req: * Requirement: Install Node.js + Yarn (if applicable). Install the exact Node.js version required by the project (usually written in README or package.json).
reactNode.s1Desc1: The first opening might take a few minutes to install dependencies.
reactNode.s1Desc2: Open the terminal and run the following commands
reactNode.s1Desc3: React app usually runs at: http://localhost:3000
reactNode.s2Desc1: Open the terminal and run the following commands
reactNode.s2Desc2: Check config files like config.js, .env, or config/default.json.
reactNode.s2Warning: ⚠️ If there is an .env.example, you need to copy it: cp .env.example .env
reactNode.s3L2: => When calling fetch('/api/...'), React will proxy to backend at port 5000.
reactNode.s4L1: Visit: http://localhost:3000 → Does the UI display?
reactNode.s4L2: Open Developer Console → check for API errors

php.title: PHP SOURCE CODE INSTALLATION PROCESS
php.s1Desc1: After installation, turn on Apache and MySQL from XAMPP Control Panel.
php.s2Desc1: Open XAMPP installation folder, for example: C:\xampp\htdocs
php.s2Desc2: Extract the purchased source code → place in subfolder, e.g.: C:\xampp\htdocs\myproject
php.s3L1: If there is an index.php file, it will run automatically.
php.s3L2: If it is Laravel or a framework, you might need the commands below (→ see Step 5).
php.s4L2: Create a database with the exact name requested in the configuration file (usually .env, config.php, database.php, or similar).
php.s4L3: Import the .sql file if provided by the source code (usually located in database/, sql/, db/, or assets/ folder)
php.s5Desc1: Laravel usually runs on: php artisan serve

python.title: PYTHON PROJECT LOCAL RUN PROCESS
python.s2L1: Check configuration: Review configuration files such as config.py, .env, or settings.py for info like database, API keys, or connection ports.
python.s2L2: Create database (if any): If the project requires a database, you need to create and import the schema (if provided).
python.s3L3: Usually runs at http://127.0.0.1:8000 (Django) or http://localhost:5000 (Flask).
python.s3L5: Run GUI application with command: python main.py
python.s4L1: If you encounter errors, check console messages and make sure all libraries are fully installed.
python.s4L2: Check the requirements.txt file, or included docs to correctly install necessary libraries.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.p1: Thanhtruckb supports entrepreneurs everywhere, creating more inclusive opportunities for everyone. We also help you manage your privacy preferences and exercise your privacy rights when visiting our website, using our services, and communicating with us.
privacyPolicy.p2: Personal data includes data that identifies or can be used to identify a specific person, along with any data about that person. For example: your name, address, and payment information is personal data.
privacyPolicy.p2_1: We act as a controller when we process personal data for our own use. For example, we act as a controller when you provide personal data to open an account.
privacyPolicy.p2_2: This notice does not apply when our clients or others process personal data for their own benefit. For example, when a client sends an email for their own business purposes including personal data, the client acts as the "controller". When our client acts as a controller, we act as a "processor" and only process personal data according to the client's instructions or as required by law.
privacyPolicy.p3: This notice does not apply to third-party applications provided through our services or linked through our websites, such as Microsoft 365 and similar services. For information about the privacy practices of any third-party service, please review the privacy notice applicable to that service before use.
privacyPolicy.corePrivacyDesc: We recognize several core privacy rights of every individual:
privacyPolicy.coreL1: The right to know what personal data we hold about you
privacyPolicy.coreL2: The right to access, correct, or delete your personal data
privacyPolicy.coreL3: The right to transfer your personal data (data portability)
privacyPolicy.coreL4: The right to set your personal marketing and advertising preferences
privacyPolicy.coreDesc1: When appropriate and technically feasible, we will provide self-service and automated mechanisms to allow individuals to exercise their privacy rights. We also manually review requests to exercise privacy rights when self-service mechanisms are inappropriate or unfeasible. We will promptly review such requests to exercise privacy rights. If we need more information to process the request, we will contact the requester via email or, if the requester does not have an email address on file, by the same method as when the request was made.
privacyPolicy.coreDesc2: If we do not process a request for legal or other reasons, we will explain why we did not process the request, the right to appeal, and any right to file a complaint (if applicable where the requester lives).
privacyPolicy.collectP1: We collect personal data when customers or others create accounts, use our services, or contact us. Examples of personal data we may collect include a person's name, email address, phone number, physical address, and payment method.
privacyPolicy.collectP2: We automatically collect personal data when you visit our website, use our services, contact us, open our emails, or view our ads. Examples of personal data we may collect include your device ID, your IP address, information about the websites and other pages you visit, and other similar details.
privacyPolicy.collectP3: We may collect personal data about you from other sources. Examples of personal data collected from other sources include public data, social media information, and information legally collected by third-party data providers.
privacyPolicy.collectP4: We process data related to our business and services to generate inferences and insights that may relate to a specific person, including through the use of data analytics and artificial intelligence.
privacyPolicy.usePersonalDataDesc: We use personal data to operate and improve our business and services. Examples of how we use personal data include:
privacyPolicy.useL5: Securing, updating, and improving our services
privacyPolicy.useL7: Contacting customers, prospects, and others via phone, text message, or messaging apps to provide you with our services
privacyPolicy.useL8: Other uses consistent with the purpose for which personal data was collected or provided to us
privacyPolicy.useL10: We do not sell, rent, sub-lease, or transfer personal data to third parties for financial or other purposes.
privacyPolicy.disclosureL1: To processors to operate our business and provide services, including but not limited to providing security, processing payments, and customer support; conducting contests and surveys; generating data insights; and performing other activities related to our business and services.
privacyPolicy.disclosureL2: To business partners providing certain services, such as payment processing and email.
privacyPolicy.disclosureL3: To marketers and advertisers, including for the purpose of creating and delivering personalized marketing and advertising messages.
privacyPolicy.disclosureL4: To comply with law enforcement and other legal requirements, protect our legal rights, prevent harm to us or others, and enforce our policies and contracts.
privacyPolicy.disclosureL5: In addition, if we sell part or all of our assets or merge with a third party, we have the right to transfer relevant personal data to the buyer or new company.
privacyPolicy.disclosureP1: We directly manage some identifier data. Other identifier data is managed by third parties. For example, we use Google Analytics to track website performance and visitor engagement.
privacyPolicy.disclosureP2: We provide several methods for managing optional identifier settings. Individuals using our website can manage their identifier settings by clicking Manage Privacy Settings via the link in this notice. Customers can also manage their identifier settings for our websites and services through their customer account settings. We do not provide mandatory identifier management because those identifiers are necessary to provide our products and services.
privacyPolicy.notTrack: “Do Not Track” and other optional signals
privacyPolicy.notTrackDesc1: Some web browsers provide a "Do Not Track" feature. There is no generally accepted standard for this feature, and we do not respond to "Do Not Track" signals.
privacyPolicy.notTrackDesc2: We recognize common opt-out mechanisms, such as Global Privacy Control, when required by applicable law.
privacyPolicy.storageDesc: We store personal data on our own systems and with trusted service providers.
privacyPolicy.retentionDesc: We retain personal data as long as our business needs permit and to comply with the law. If we no longer need the personal data, we may delete or de-identify it so that it no longer identifies a specific person. We consider the following factors when deciding when to delete or deactivate your personal data: (1) whether you still have an account, (2) whether we are required to retain personal data to comply with the law, or (3) whether the personal data is necessary for other business purposes for tax purposes.
privacyPolicy.securityDesc: We use risk-based measures to protect personal data, including appropriate security controls and employee training. We also require our service providers, business partners, and advertisers to use appropriate risk-based controls to protect personal data.
privacyPolicy.noChildren: No personal data collected from children
privacyPolicy.noChildrenDesc: We do not intentionally collect personal data from children under 18 without the consent of their legal guardian. Please contact us at lucentiscompany@gmail.com if you believe we have collected information from children without the consent of their legal guardian.
privacyPolicy.legalBasisDesc: We process personal data at a person's request, with their consent, to perform a contract with us, based on our legitimate interests, or other lawful bases. The specific basis for processing depends on the service you are using, the data being processed, where the processing takes place, and where you live. If you have any questions about the basis for processing your personal data, please contact us at lucentiscompany@gmail.com.
privacyPolicy.noDiscrimDesc: We will not discriminate against you for exercising your privacy rights.
privacyPolicy.noFinancialDesc: We do not offer any financial incentives for you to provide us with personal data.
privacyPolicy.policyChangeDesc: We may amend this global privacy notice by posting the amended statement in the same location as this Notice, in another location on our website, or by contacting customers directly. If we change this global privacy notice, the contents of the notice will only apply to personal data collected before the new statement is applied to the extent that the new statement does not reduce the rights of the affected data subjects.
privacyPolicy.contactDesc: If you have any questions, you can contact us:

handlingProcess.title: Complaint Reception and Resolution Process
handlingProcess.p1: All complaints, feedback, and reviews from Customers not related to refunds and returns are resolved on the basis of negotiation and suggestion.
handlingProcess.p2: We receive all feedback from customers. Any questions or comments please send to: lucentiscompany@gmail.com
handlingProcess.p3: All cases related to the return and refund policy will be resolved on a negotiation basis.
handlingProcess.p4: In case the desired agreement cannot be reached, either party has the right to bring the matter to a competent state agency for resolution.
handlingProcess.p5: In case an incident occurs due to the fault of <u>lucentis.it.com</u>, we will immediately apply necessary measures to ensure the Customer's rights.
handlingProcess.p6: Customers can send complaints requesting LUCENTIS CO., LTD to resolve in the following ways:
handlingProcess.p10: Customers send complaints regarding services or rights not fully guaranteed by LUCENTIS CO., LTD through the methods mentioned above.
handlingProcess.p12: LUCENTIS CO., LTD will receive Customer complaints and proceed to verify information. Within 03 working days from the date of receiving the complaint, we will contact the Customer to verify information and inform about the processing progress.
handlingProcess.p13: * Step 3: Respond to customers and resolve complaints.
handlingProcess.p14: LUCENTIS CO., LTD will respond with the complaint resolution results to the Customer within 03 working days from the date of completing information verification and processing. In case more time is needed to verify and process, we will inform the Customer of the reasons and estimated time to complete processing.
handlingProcess.p15: LUCENTIS CO., LTD and related parties will try to verify information and resolve complaints quickly and timely to ensure the Customer's rights. In case it exceeds the capacity and authority of the Center, we will ask the Customer to bring this matter to the competent state agency for resolution in accordance with the law.

copyrightGameHelp.title: Reasons to buy our Products
copyrightGameHelp.p1: Using products without paying for copyright is indeed beneficial, but you will never get a good experience like those who have paid for the Product.
copyrightGameHelp.p2: Statistics have shown that Vietnam is always in the top 10 countries in the world in terms of the rate of pirated software usage. Users have long been accustomed to cracking, so much so that whenever they want to experience a newly released product, most of us usually search for the cracked version on Google first rather than looking to buy it on steam or other publishing platforms.
copyrightGameHelp.p3: Obviously, being able to play blockbuster products without spending a dime is very attractive, but certainly, cracked versions will never provide a good experience. Here are the reasons why you should consider deciding whether to buy a license or not.
copyrightGameHelp.p4: When buying, you will always receive the latest updates from the publisher. And all update operations are completely automatic; you hardly need to do anything.
copyrightGameHelp.p5: Compared to cracked versions, depending on the crack group, the time from receiving an update from the publisher to having a cracked version can take from a few days to a few weeks. There might even be no update version.
copyrightGameHelp.p6: Being continuously updated with the latest features and tools will help you not worry about being spoiled before content or waiting tediously.
copyrightGameHelp.p7: With current trends, many Products require an Online connection.
copyrightGameHelp.p8: You will almost certainly not see this Online feature on Cracked versions. And if there is no online feature, you have almost lost 50% of the product experience. For Cracked versions, you can only use it with boring Bots.
copyrightGameHelp.h3: Simple Installation and Supported by Publisher
copyrightGameHelp.p9: The steps to install a crack are usually very complicated and very prone to errors during installation.
copyrightGameHelp.p10: With current products mostly released on major platforms
copyrightGameHelp.p11: Your installation job is just boiled down to 1 "Download" button, then use it Super simply.
copyrightGameHelp.p12: Also, in case of errors, you can absolutely contact the publisher directly for support.
copyrightGameHelp.p13: This will never happen with a Cracked version.
copyrightGameHelp.p14: Do you ever wonder why people spend time and effort entirely cracking and then posting for free online?
copyrightGameHelp.p15: You must know that cracking requires a very high level of hacking and takes a lot of effort.
copyrightGameHelp.p17: Because most software and cracked versions will contain malicious software such as: Trojans, Bitcoin Miners, Data Stealers, Viruses.
copyrightGameHelp.p18: When using Lucentis products, you will completely avoid these unsafe security issues. All software is Downloaded directly from the publisher, so there will be no chance of getting an additional Virus or malicious code installed.
copyrightGameHelp.h5: Added to your account so you can use it on multiple devices
copyrightGameHelp.p19: Nowadays, when you buy something, it is tied to your account. Once it's in your account, you just log in on any device and you can download and experience it.
copyrightGameHelp.p20: Not only that, these platforms also support synchronizing between all your devices so that your experience is the most seamless.
copyrightGameHelp.p21: For example: If you play on another computer then turn it off. When you get home and turn it on, you can totally continue it exactly at the moment you saved on the previous device. Fantastic right ^^
copyrightGameHelp.h6: Special Features Only in Lucentis Products
copyrightGameHelp.p22: Using a license you can also get added special features like Item Trading, Trading Cards, Collecting Badges to exchange items.
copyrightGameHelp.p23: Every amount you spend to buy goes back to developers, back to those who created great products for you to enjoy. This is the money they deserve after all the effort put in, and also serves as funding for their next projects. The money you pay to buy it not only helps you own it legally but also sets the premise for increasingly top-notch products from the developer.
copyrightGameHelp.p24: Conversely, using a crack version is not simply a bargain for you, it also contributes to the loss of funding that developers, product publishers deserve, causing significant damage to them. The cracked version essentially means you are contributing to suffocating those who made products for you to use.
copyrightGameHelp.p25: Spending a little money and receiving a lot of values as above is completely worthy.
copyrightGameHelp.p26: * Currently with special pricing policies for users. Product titles are becoming very cheap, sometimes just a few thousand dong or tens of thousands of dong, cheaper than a cup of milk tea.
copyrightGameHelp.img1: Products will always be updated quickly and are the latest
copyrightGameHelp.img2: Virtual reality products require users to be Online
copyrightGameHelp.img3: Cracked software software is often bundled with malicious code
copyrightGameHelp.img4: Beautiful items achievable only by playing Licensed Products
copyrightGameHelp.img5: Can be used on multiple devices
copyrightGameHelp.img6: Products are becoming increasingly cheaper for users
